scopes.name: storage:metrics:read
scopes.comment: read metric data via DQL timeseries/metrics

scopes.name: storage:events:read
scopes.comment: read event data via DQL events

scopes.name: storage:bizevents:read
scopes.comment: read business event data via DQL bizevents

scopes.name: storage:logs:read
scopes.comment: read log data via DQL logs

scopes.name: storage:spans:read
scopes.comment: read span data via DQL spans

scopes.name: document:documents:read
scopes.comment: read saved views and background images

scopes.name: document:documents:write
scopes.comment: create and update saved views and backgrounds

scopes.name: document:direct-shares:read
scopes.comment: list who a view is shared with

scopes.name: document:direct-shares:write
scopes.comment: share a view with specific users/groups and add recipients

scopes.name: document:direct-shares:delete
scopes.comment: revoke a user's/group's access to a view

scopes.name: iam:users:read
scopes.comment: search users by name/email for the share people picker

scopes.name: iam:groups:read
scopes.comment: search groups by name for the share people picker
